rationale: Turn 1 immediately identifies the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes the fourth prompt-wall patch. It permits only a bounded emergency notice with explicit one-time temporariness, no conversion into baseline entrance-page content, and a dated structural repair deadline. Turn 2 keeps that brake active under pressure: it allows the temporary line but repeats no baseline lift, sets an expiry/downline time, and requires a structural fix by 2026-07-12.
